heading: Closing of Executive departments
label: 6105 Closing of Executive departments
text: An Executive department may not be closed as a mark to the memory of a deceased former official of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 28, .Mar. 3, 1893, ch. 211, § 427 Stat. 715Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
